name: vscreen
description: Virtual Screen Media Bridge — build tooling

scripts.test:all: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:doc && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.fuzz:input: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run input_parser -- -max_total_time=60
scripts.fuzz:cdp: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run cdp_message -- -max_total_time=60
scripts.fuzz:signaling: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run signaling_msg -- -max_total_time=60
scripts.fuzz:api: cd fuzz && cargo +nightly fuzz run api_request -- -max_total_time=60
scripts.fuzz:all: pnpm fuzz:input && pnpm fuzz:cdp && pnpm fuzz:signaling && pnpm fuzz:api
scripts.release: pnpm check && pnpm test:all && pnpm build:release && echo 'Release binary: target/release/vscreen'
scripts.precommit: pnpm check:fmt && pnpm check:clippy && pnpm test:unit
